delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this audio recording ({{filename}})? This will also delete all associated transcriptions and reports. This action cannot be undone.
retry_confirmation: Retry processing for {{filename}}? The AI will re-transcribe and regenerate the report.

annotations.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this annotation?
annotations.helpText: Select text in the report to add annotations
annotations.noAnnotationsDescription: Add annotations to highlight important sections
annotations.title: Annotations

upload.record_instruction: Click the button below to start recording your speech
upload.record_hint: You can pause and resume during recording
upload.processing_audio_message: Please wait while we transcribe and analyze your audio. This may take a few minutes...
upload.clear_recording_confirmation_message: Are you sure you want to clear this recording? This action cannot be undone.
upload.uploading_audio_message: Preparing your audio file for AI analysis...

tips.quiet_environment: Record in a quiet environment with minimal background noise
tips.speak_clearly: Speak clearly and at a normal pace
tips.good_microphone: Use a good quality microphone when possible

upload.unsaved_data_warning: You have unsaved recording data. Are you sure you want to leave?
upload.recording_in_progress_warning: Recording in progress - don't navigate away or refresh the page!
upload.unsaved_recording_warning: You have an unsaved recording. Make sure to upload it before leaving this page.

errors.processing_timeout: Processing timeout - please check your reports page later
errors.duplicate_file: This audio file has already been uploaded. Please check your existing recordings or select a different file.
errors.file_processing: This audio file is currently being processed. Please wait for it to complete or check your reports page.

upload.duplicate_file_redirecting: This file was already processed. Redirecting to existing report...
upload.duplicate_file_processing: This file is being processed. Redirecting to reports...
upload.select_report_type_description: Select the type of report you want to generate from this recording.
upload.consent_label: I acknowledge that the patient has consented to this audio recording being transcribed and analyzed for speech therapy purposes.
upload.consent_helper: This acknowledgment is required to comply with data protection regulations and ensure ethical clinical practice.
upload.duplicate_file_no_report: This file has already been uploaded.
